finding_description: 3 POs above INR 10L processed without competitive bidding per policy 4.2
root_cause_analysis: Process gap — SAP system does not enforce minimum quotation requirement above threshold; manual override possible without documentation
corrective_action: Configure SAP workflow to block PO creation >10L without minimum 3 attached quotations; interim: procurement head manual review
preventive_action: Quarterly audit of all POs >10L for bidding compliance; add bidding compliance to vendor audit checklist

finding_description: Near miss — crane load swung due to improper single-point rigging on 6m pipe spool
root_cause_analysis: Rigger not trained on updated lifting procedure (Nov-2025); supervisor absent during lift; no pre-lift toolbox talk
corrective_action: Rigger retrained and re-certified; supervisor counseled; mandatory pre-lift checklist implemented
preventive_action: Camera monitoring on overhead cranes; monthly rigging technique audit; lifting plan included in daily toolbox talk template
effectiveness_verified: Yes — no repeat incidents in 60 days

finding_description: 15 controlled documents found at revision levels 1-2 behind current; operators using outdated work instructions
root_cause_analysis: Document control system (manual distribution) is slow; no automatic notification when new revision issued; operators rely on physical copies in work stations
corrective_action: Updated all 15 documents to current revision; recalled obsolete copies; issued controlled copies to all work stations
preventive_action: Implement electronic document management system (DMS) with auto-notification; make document access digital at work stations (tablets); quarterly random audit of document currency
effectiveness_verified: Yes — spot check confirmed all docs current

finding_description: LTI — worker fell 3m from scaffold; harness worn but not hooked; anchor point missing on scaffold extension
root_cause_analysis: Scaffold extension added without corresponding anchor point installation; site supervisor did not inspect scaffold before clearing work
corrective_action: Anchor points installed on all scaffold bays; 100% scaffold inspection before work clearance; L&T supervisor issued show-cause
preventive_action: Retractable lifeline systems on all scaffolds >2m; scaffold modification triggers mandatory re-inspection; daily pre-shift scaffold inspection by dedicated EHS personnel
effectiveness_verified: Yes — 2 scaffold audits since with 100% compliance

finding_description: Technician replaced wrong control valve during maintenance visit — installed V-201 instead of V-203; caused process upset requiring 6-hour shutdown
root_cause_analysis: Technician relied on memory instead of checking P&ID; valve tags on site were faded/unreadable; technician under time pressure from customer
corrective_action: Correct valve installed; customer compensated for lost production (6 hours); all valve tags at site replaced with permanent stainless steel tags
preventive_action: Implement mandatory P&ID verification step in service work order; pre-service digital checklist with valve ID photo confirmation; service technician refresher training on site orientation
effectiveness_verified: Pending — next similar service visit not yet occurred

finding_description: 200L phosphate chemical spill from forklift-punctured IBC; entered floor drain
root_cause_analysis: Wrong fork attachment used for IBC handling; storage rack clearance insufficient after racking modification; spill kit located 50m away
corrective_action: IBC-specific forks installed; rack spacing revised to 150mm minimum clearance; area cleaned and tested
preventive_action: Secondary containment bunds around all chemical storage; quarterly chemical spill drills; spill kits relocated within 10m of every chemical storage area
